---
name: Feature Task Issue Template
about: Brief description of the feature/task.
title: "[FEAT]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code is in the appropriate directory
- [ ] Functionality works as specified
- [ ] Proper error handling implemented
- [ ] Follows existing schema/patterns from research
- [ ] Endpoints return correct HTTP status codes
- [ ] Changes are tested and working

## Additional Notes
- Reference: `research/backend-research/schema-example.js`
- Ask in Slack if schema needs clarification

## Usage
Just paste the template, then add one line at the top specifying what your task is
